commands.review_summary:
The PR adds SQLite read-back verification to doctor auth-profile JSON migration and a regression test that keeps legacy JSON when verification misses an imported profile.

PR surface: Source +63, Tests +33. Total +96 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main saves the migrated auth store and then removes legacy JSON/state files without read-back verification. I did not run a real upgrade reproduction in this read-only review.
